case_title: THE RITZ CARLTON HOTEL vs. HOLMAN, JON STEPHEN et al

docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-24-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-24-1997, OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY DAVID M. GONOR FOR 3RD FTA. TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE OR PROOF OF PUBLICATION. WHY PREVIOUS SANCTIONS HAVE NOT BEEN PAID. PLTF'S ATTY TO FILE NEW STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-09-1997 CONTINUED FROM SEP-24-1997 TO NOV-05-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER AND ORDER DISMISSAL IS DEEMED FILED ON JUL. 30 1997 AND SANCTIONS AGAINST THE PLTF ARE VACATED FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE RITZ CARLETON HOTEL COMPANY DBA THE RITZ CARLTON LAGUNA NIGUEL, A CORPORATION

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-14-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE $100 SANCTION ON PLFF'S COUNSEL, PAYABLE 5/29/97. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-05-1997, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSED.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-03-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-03-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND OSC FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR APR-08-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF APR-08-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE FOR POS OR ORDER TO SERVE BY PUBLICATION. HEARING SET FOR MAY-14-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-30-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-30-1997, TO FILE POS OR PROOF OF PUBLICATION AND PAY PREVIOUSLY AND FURTHER IMPOSED SANCTIONS. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY DAVID M. GONOR., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-14-1997 CONTINUED FROM JUL-30-1997 TO SEP-24-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
